7-day free trial

A more empowered you starts with Sweat

Our goal? Helping you smash your goals. As a world-leading fitness app, Sweat has transformed the lives of millions of women since 2015, all the way from Sydney to Singapore to San Diego.

From the most determined athlete to the woman putting on her trainers for the very first time, who better to have your back than a global community of women trained by women on a platform built by women? 

There’s nothing like the feeling of stepping into a stronger version of you, and at Sweat, we know we’re strongest together.

7-day free trial

All you've got to do is show up. We've got the rest.

It feels good to Sweat.

We go wherever you go, whether that’s the corner of your garage, a hotel room or a bustling gym.

Set yourself up for success

And find your perfect fit with fitness that fits into your life. Choose from thousands of workouts and work out anywhere, anytime.

Fuel yourself forward

With food that feels good. Power your progress and take the guesswork out of your next meal with hundreds of recipe ideas for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

7-day free trial

Ready to try a workout?

Your first week is on us

Start your 7-day free trial today

Train with the empowering support of women from every corner of the globe

Nobody knows Sweat like we do

Expert trainers who GET IT

They understand what you need from a fitness program, because they've been there, too.

Support from the Sweat Community

An incredible group of women who are not only striving to be the best version of themselves, but to empower the women around them.

Move your way

Boost your health and wellbeing with thousands of training options for every fitness level and lifestyle.

7-day free trial

Whether you’re a fitness fanatic, a first-timer or somewhere in between, we’ve got you.

No matter how you like to train, Sweat has you covered

We have a feeling you're going to love Sweat

That's why the first week is on us.

Start your 7-day free trial today

The fitness app trusted by millions of women.
